subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! God willing, mayest thou be occupied at all times and seasons with the remembrance of the Dawning-Place of Divine Revelation, the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز الهی انشاء الله در جمیع اوان و احیان بذکر مشرق وحی رحمن مشغول باشی و
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @role and station of women, @goodly deeds; actions, @praise and encouragement
